mapper.sql: rdp_ds_kv_base_config.id id, rdp_ds_kv_base_config.gmt_create gmt_create, rdp_ds_kv_base_config.gmt_modified gmt_modified, rdp_ds_kv_base_config.data_source_id data_source_id, rdp_ds_kv_base_config.config_name config_name, rdp_ds_kv_base_config.config_group config_group, rdp_ds_kv_base_config.display display, rdp_ds_kv_base_config.desc_key desc_key, rdp_ds_kv_base_config.value_require value_require, rdp_ds_kv_base_config.value_valid_regex value_valid_regex, rdp_ds_kv_base_config.config_value config_value, rdp_ds_kv_base_config.default_value default_value, rdp_ds_kv_base_config.value_advance value_advance, rdp_ds_kv_base_config.read_only read_only, rdp_ds_kv_base_config.is_secret is_secret, rdp_ds_kv_base_config.conf_val_type conf_val_type
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM rdp_ds_kv_base_config WHERE rdp_ds_kv_base_config.data_source_id = #{dsId} AND rdp_ds_kv_base_config.config_name = #{configName}
